Finance archetype theme

Source: R/theme-finance.R
theme_finance.Rd

Preset path through ct_theme() tuned for finance reports and pitch books: serif typography ("Source Serif 4" with a Georgia / Times / serif fallback chain), regular-weight title (restrained — finance reports avoid bold), and a lighter major gridline than the strategy archetype.

Usage

theme_finance(main_color = NULL, ...)

Arguments

main_color

Colour for the title and the theme geom ink slot. NULL (default) falls back to finance_classic[1].

...

Forwarded to ct_theme() — e.g. density, context, base_size, or an explicit palette override.

Value

A ggplot2::theme() object.

Examples

library(ggplot2)
p <- ggplot(economics, aes(date, unemploy)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_finance()
